name: Golf Etc. Bismarck
about: Golf Etc. Bismarck is a multi-faceted golf simulator venue offering 8 high-definition simulators, custom club fitting, and golf lessons. The facility combines a virtual golf center with a pro shop, providing an all-in-one experience for golfers to practice, play, and equip themselves. It caters to both casual players looking to enjoy a round of virtual golf and serious golfers seeking to improve their game through technology and professional fitting services. The venue operates with a clear seasonal pricing structure and allows for group and private bookings, making it versatile for different types of golfers and events.
why_golfers_like_it: 8 high-definition golf simulators for an immersive experience
Custom club fitting services with certified technicians using Foresight launch monitors
Comprehensive pro shop carrying major golf brand equipment
Availability of golf lessons for all skill levels
Flexible group and party rates for events and gatherings

food_and_drink.notes: On-site pizza service available via Jimmy's Pizza
Alcohol service available, with right to refuse service at discretion

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art Foresight launch monitors used for club fitting

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs to use on the simulators. Club rentals may be available, but this is not explicitly stated.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and beverages are not allowed. The venue offers pizza from Jimmy's Pizza and has its own bar service.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, typical simulator play times range from 1.5-2 hours for 18 holes, depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers junior golf programs including a Junior Golf League and Junior Golf Camp, indicating it is family-friendly and caters to young golfers.
